details.test: Task 1: Download free Windows tool with latest release and 64-bit download
Task 2: Compare two Windows tools and favorite the smaller download
Task 3: Add three lightweight Windows tools to favorites and open their details
Task 4: Open review for cheapest VPN trial under $10/month
Task 5: Open latest security article about password managers and click main download
Task 6: Register, set OS preferences, and favorite one tool per OS
Task 7: Open version history and download for a Windows tool
Task 8: Subscribe to newsletter from article with Security and Productivity topics
Task 9: Comment on review article with 5-star rating
